decks.notes: The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly using cards like Arboreal Grazer and Green Sun's Zenith to accelerate towards the win condition of Scapeshift. By getting multiple Valakut, the Molten Pinnacle on the battlefield with Dryad of the Ilysian Grove and Prismatic Omen, the deck can deal massive amounts of damage to the opponent in a single turn. The inclusion of control elements like Lightning Bolt and Wrenn and Six help in disrupting the opponent's game plan while maintaining a strong board presence. The deck aims to control the game until it can combo off and win in a single explosive turn.

The main concept of this deck is to fill the graveyard with creatures using various cycling cards and then casting Living End to bring them all back onto the battlefield. This combo strategy allows the player to quickly amass a powerful board presence and overwhelm their opponent in a Modern 1 vs 1 format. The inclusion of cards like Subtlety, Generous Ent, and Shardless Agent provide additional ways to cycle through the deck and find the necessary pieces for the combo. Additionally, cards like Endurance and Force of Negation help protect the combo from disruption.

This deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures and controlling the board with removal spells. It aims to quickly reduce the opponent's life total by playing efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Territorial Kavu while using Lightning Bolt and Leyline Binding to deal with threats. Quantum Riddler provides card advantage and Consign to Memory offers additional removal options. Stubborn Denial and Leyline of the Guildpact help protect your creatures while Arena of Glory provides a mana advantage. The deck also includes some land cards that provide different colors of mana to ensure you can cast your spells.

The main idea of this deck is to control the game through counterspells, removal, and hand disruption while generating card advantage with Planeswalkers like Teferi, Time Raveler and Narset, Parter of Veils. The deck aims to maintain board control with sweepers like Supreme Verdict and Wrath of the Skies, while also utilizing Isochron Scepter for extra value. The inclusion of Kaheera as a companion allows for additional synergy with creature spells. Overall, the deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy and eventually winning through incremental advantage.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on deploying small, aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It also includes cards like Goblin Bombardment and Voice of Victory to deal direct damage and finish off the opponent. The deck aims to maintain a steady stream of pressure on the opponent while still having some versatility with cards like Thraben Charm and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah. With a mix of creatures and spells, this deck is designed to close out games quickly through efficient aggression and damage output.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively deal damage to the opponent using a combination of artifact creatures, direct burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Blast, and sacrificing artifacts for additional damage with cards like Shrapnel Blast. The deck also utilizes Urza's Saga to tutor for key artifacts and lands. Additionally, Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer provides extra damage and card advantage. The deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent and win the game before they can stabilize.

This deck focuses on aggressive creature strategies combined with instant flicker effects to create powerful synergy and disrupt opponent's plans. By using cards like Solitude and Flickerwisp, the deck can continuously blink powerful creatures such as Phelia and Emperor of Bones to maintain pressure and control the board. Thoughtseize and Fatal Push provide disruption and removal, while Quantum Riddler and Witch Enchanter offer card advantage. Teferi, Time Raveler adds another layer of disruption to keep opponents off balance, making this deck a versatile and challenging opponent to face in 1 vs 1 Modern format.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing the UrzaTron lands to quickly ramp up mana for powerful Eldrazi creatures and planeswalkers. The deck includes disruption spells like Thought-Knot Seer and Chalice of the Void to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Karn, the Great Creator is a key card that can shut down artifacts while also tutoring for powerful cards like Trinisphere. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with Eldrazi creatures and planeswalkers while controlling the game with disruption spells and powerful abilities.

This deck focuses on assembling UrzaTron (Urza's Power Plant, Urza's Mine, Urza's Tower) to generate a large amount of mana quickly. By controlling the board with cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, the Eye of the Storms, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while deploying powerful threats like Emrakul, the Promised End. The deck also utilizes Eldrazi creatures and powerful spells like Thought-Knot Seer and All Is Dust to further control the game and cement its advantage.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. The key strategy is to maintain a fast pace by playing efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, while using burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Lightning Bolt to control the board and finish off the opponent. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah helps protect the creatures and push through for more damage. Ultimately, the goal is to close out the game before the opponent has a chance to establish their own game plan.

The deck focuses on using the combo of Basking Broodscale and Blade of the Bloodchief to create a powerful creature that can quickly overwhelm the opponent. It also utilizes cards like Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Additionally, it includes cards such as Emrakul, the Promised End and Urza's Saga for additional win conditions and card advantage. The deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces while controlling the game with removal and disruption spells.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly generate mana through rituals and spells like Manamorphose and Ruby Medallion to cast powerful spells like Ral, Monsoon Mage and Wrenn's Resolve. The deck aims to generate a high amount of mana in a short amount of time to burn the opponent out with cards like Hex Magic and Valakut Awakening. Additionally, the deck includes Past in Flames to recur key spells from the graveyard and maintain pressure on the opponent. Elegant Parlor and Wish provide additional utility and flexibility to the deck's gameplan.

This deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures and quickly overwhelming the opponent with a mix of efficient creatures and removal spells. The deck aims to control the board while dealing damage consistently, utilizing Leyline of the Guildpact to give its creatures additional strength. The inclusion of Leyline Binding and Doorkeeper Thrull helps to disrupt the opponent's game plan and protect its own creatures. The deck also has access to a variety of lands to fix its mana base and ensure a smooth curve of plays.

The deck focuses on using Broodscale Bloodchief's ability to sacrifice creatures for value, while also utilizing cards like Glaring Fleshraker and Devourer of Destiny to control the board. Kozilek's Command provides versatility and disruption, while Eldrazi Temple and Ugin's Labyrinth help ramp into powerful threats like Emrakul, the Promised End. The deck also includes cards like Blade of the Bloodchief to pump up creatures and Sowing Mycospawn for token generation. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a combination of combo pieces and aggressive creatures.

This UW Control deck focuses on using a combination of counterspells, removal, and card advantage to control the game and outvalue the opponent. It also utilizes Teferi, Time Raveler to disrupt the opponent's strategies and protect its own gameplan. The addition of Kaheera as a companion provides additional versatility and resilience to the deck. By carefully managing resources and controlling the tempo of the game, this deck aims to outmaneuver opponents and secure a victory through careful planning and strategic play.

The primary focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of counterspells, discard spells, and removal. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while slowly building up its own resources. By utilizing cards like Force of Negation, Thoughtseize, Counterspell, and Fatal Push, the deck can efficiently deal with threats and maintain board control. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provide additional card advantage and potential win conditions. The deck prioritizes resource management and strategic decision-making to outsmart and outlast the opponent.
